user.title: Connect to eParkai.lt
user.description: Enter your eParkai.lt credentials. The Client ID can be found in your profile URL on eparkai.lt.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials or client ID. Please verify your login at eparkai.lt.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to eParkai.lt. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This client ID is already configured.

list_plants.title: Your Power Plants
list_plants.description: You have {plant_count} power plant(s) configured. Select one to remove it.

remove_plant.title: Remove Power Plant
remove_plant.description: Are you sure you want to remove **{name}** (ID: {id})?

add_plant.title: Add Power Plant
add_plant.description: Enter the power plant details. The plant ID can be found in the generation form on eparkai.lt.

import_generation.name: Import generation data
import_generation.description: Manually trigger import of solar generation data from eParkai.lt.
